description.text: Towers galore to climb or destroy.  Two Cubes and a Base.

ru.original: Towers galore to climb or destroy.  Two Cubes and a Base.
ru.translation: Башни повсюду - можно залезть, можно разрушить. Два куба и база.

es.original: Towers galore to climb or destroy.  Two Cubes and a Base.
es.translation:
Torres por doquier para trepar o destruir.
Dos generadores y un núcleo.

de.original: Towers galore to climb or destroy.  Two Cubes and a Base.
de.translation: Türme zum Erklimmen und Zerstören im Übermaß! Zwei Generatoren und eine Basis.

pt.original: Towers galore to climb or destroy.  Two Cubes and a Base.
pt.translation: Muitas torres para escalar ou destruir. Dois Cubos e uma Base.

fr.original: Towers galore to climb or destroy.  Two Cubes and a Base.
fr.translation: Des tours en veux-tu en voilà. Deux cubes et une base.
